mapper.select: select id, system_id, tenant_id, app_id, parent_id, menu_name, page_id, sort_no, visible_flag, perm_key, api_pattern, module_fields_json, create_user_id, update_user_id, create_time, update_time from un_module_menu where app_id = #{appId} and api_pattern is not null and api_pattern <> '' and perm_key is not null and perm_key <> ''
